name: Clams Oregatana Basilico
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. Shuck clams and place the meat in half-shells.
3. Stuff each half-shell with about 1 heaping tablespoon of stuffing.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and sprinkle each clam with a few drops of wine.
6. Return to oven and bake an additional 2 to 3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Stuffing: Combine all ingredients by mixing with hands. Add more olive oil if the mixture seems too dry.
